title: Legend of the Guardians: The Owls of Ga'Hoole
original_title: Legend of the Guardians: The Owls of Ga'Hoole
overview: When a young owl is abducted by an evil Owl army, he must escape with new-found friends and seek the legendary Guardians to stop the menace.
